title: Double S2
wikitext:
[]: Double S2             Quote Post by Mad » Sat Jan 16, 2010 8:05 pm This may be an odd question and it really doesn't have an answer but oh well. What do you think would happen if Unit 01 was to consume another s2 organ? For some reason I've been thinking about this, and I have no answer.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Sat Jan 16, 2010 8:09 pm Major indigestion.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Sat Jan 16, 2010 8:10 pm Awesome breakdancing skillz.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Jan 16, 2010 8:10 pm Either some sort of malfunction or she'll become very strong.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sat Jan 16, 2010 9:03 pm My guess would be; nothing. Unit-01 probably only needed to consume the S^2 organ in order to "learn" its genetic makeup so that its could repair it and "grow" its own organ around it. In a similar way to how Unit-01 appropriated Zeruel's arm in order to remake its own, it probably appropriated the S^2 organ in order to simply makes its own. Consuming another organ would probably do nothing as Unit-01 would have it "missing" piece at that point.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Sat Jan 16, 2010 10:08 pm Dance like you want to Win Angel had two S2 Organs, fun fact.

[]:             Quote Post by Ironfoot » Sat Jan 16, 2010 10:15 pm Yui would then have a pair of balls, which would then spawn a monstrous psychedelic penis 20 meters high. All the other Evangelions would gather 'round and all of the souls would all "woah!" at each other, with hands in the air like some tribal dance. Actually nothing would happen, except that Yui would have a pair of S2 engines. Makes me wonder if she would gain any of Israfel's abilities though, considering that angel had two cores. Then Yui could split into two and make hot lesbian love to herself. Yes please.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Jan 16, 2010 10:54 pm It would unleash the motherfucking moonwalk.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Sat Jan 16, 2010 11:09 pm This reminds me of the time I added a Solar reactor to a type F Eva 01.... [URL=http://s153.photobucket.com/albums/s202/Axellmds/?action=view&current=1237555001752.jpg] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by Mad » Sat Jan 16, 2010 11:27 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: It would unleash the motherfucking moonwalk.

[]:             Quote Post by felineki » Sun Jan 17, 2010 1:45 am She'd be warped to World -1.

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Sun Jan 17, 2010 3:49 am Axell wrote: This reminds me of the time I added a Solar reactor to a type F Eva 01.... [URL=http://s153.photobucket.com/albums/s202/Axellmds/?action=view&current=1237555001752.jpg] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Jan 17, 2010 3:52 am Unit-01 will pull a Unit-02 V. MPE fight, but a 1000 times more awesome and 10 times faster. Either that or all the Gurren Lagann fights combined.

[]: Re: Double S2             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Sun Jan 17, 2010 10:55 am an explosion.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Sun Jan 17, 2010 11:15 am Or nothing, she would stand back up again, roar, go poop and fall asleep.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Sun Jan 17, 2010 11:24 am hmmm, but where would it come out, theres armor on her asshole.

[]:             Quote Post by konfunoodle » Sun Jan 17, 2010 11:34 am Eva-01 would form an ass to crap it out.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Jan 17, 2010 12:22 pm konfunoodle wrote: Eva-01 would form an ass to crap it out.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sun Jan 17, 2010 12:56 pm The extra S2 engine would cancel out the existing S2 engine. So, essentially, Eva-01 would be back where it started.

[]:             Quote Post by supershinjiasukashipper » Sun Jan 17, 2010 12:58 pm BrikHaus wrote: The extra S2 engine would cancel out the existing S2 engine. So, essentially, Eva-01 would be back where it started.
